# IT Works Better

> Web development agency building websites and web applications, with ready-made scripts and selected portfolio projects.

IT Works Better provides custom frontend and backend development, SEO-oriented builds, and commercial and open-source website scripts.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://itworksbetter.net/): Company overview, services, pricing, and contact.
- [Scripts](https://itworksbetter.net/scripts): Catalog of ready-made website scripts.
- [Projects](https://itworksbetter.net/projects): Portfolio of delivered projects and technologies.
- [Privacy Policy](https://itworksbetter.net/privacy-policy): Privacy and data-handling policy.

## Markdown Sources

- [Home (Markdown)](https://itworksbetter.net/index.md): Markdown source for homepage content.
- [Scripts (Markdown)](https://itworksbetter.net/scripts.md): Markdown source generated from script data.
- [Projects (Markdown)](https://itworksbetter.net/projects.md): Markdown source generated from project data.
- [Privacy Policy (Markdown)](https://itworksbetter.net/privacy-policy.md): Markdown source generated from policy template.

## Key External Links

- [Online Shop](https://sklep.itworksbetter.net/): Purchase commercial website scripts.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/kamilwyremski): Open-source and legacy script repositories.
